name: anymodel-for-claude-code
description: Local multi-model gateway for Claude Code — route requests to 8 providers / 21 models (Claude, DeepSeek, SiliconFlow, OpenRouter, Zhipu GLM, Kimi, Gemini, Qwen, Groq) through one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Full tool_use two-way conversion, zero dependencies, Windows-friendly, GUI switcher at localhost:4000.
